results.title: How to stop Meta's Muse Image AI from using your public Instagram photos
results.description: Meta's new Muse Image feature lets users generate AI images using photos from public Instagram accounts, raising fresh questions about privacy and consent. While the company says users can opt out, the setting isn't immediately obvious. Here's how to disable it and what the feature actually does.

results.title: Sheffield Innovation Centre welcomes Royal Academy of Engineering Enterprise Hub
results.description: The UKSE Innovation Centre in Sheffield has welcomed the Royal Academy of Engineering’s Enterprise Hub as the latest organisation to establish a presence within the city-centre business community.

results.title: Elon Musk says Anthropic is the current AI leader, praises Mythos and Fable models
results.description: Elon Musk now calls Anthropic the industry's current leader in artificial intelligence. He admitted being clearly wrong about the AI startup's potential outcomes. Anthropic is a major customer of Musk's SpaceXAI infrastructure company. The AI startup uses SpaceXAI's supercomputer for its advanced models. Musk stated he would never harm a competitor, citing Tesla and SpaceX examples.

results.title: Google appeals Delhi HC keyword ads ruling, calls India a ‘global outlier’
results.description: Google has appealed the Delhi High Court ruling holding it liable for trademark infringement over keyword advertising, warning of major consequences for digital ads, consumer choice and competition. The post Google appeals Delhi HC keyword ads ruling, calls India a ‘global outlier’ appeared first on MEDIANAMA .
